queries.query: Fix my Typst paper main.typ — typst compile is failing on the abstract block.
Check my .typ manuscript for Hayagriva bibliography errors and missing citations.
Polish the related-work section of my Typst paper and derive a sharper research gap.
My Typst paper has too many long sentences — help me tighten them and check logic flow.
Reformat my .typ paper for an ACM venue and verify the three-line table style.
Convert my lovelace algorithm in Typst to look more like algpseudocodex.
帮我润色这篇用 typst 写的中文论文，去掉明显的 AI 表达。
Translate the experiment section of my Chinese .typ paper into academic English.
Optimize the title of my Typst submission to make the contribution clearer.
Run a submission-readiness check on my .typ manuscript before I send it.
Proofread my IEEE conference paper main.tex and fix biber issues.
检查我的中文学位论文 GB/T 7714 参考文献格式。
Act as a strict reviewer and produce a peer-review report with major/minor issues.
Search references.bib for papers on industrial anomaly detection.
Write a literature survey on smart manufacturing and digital twin.
Set up a CI pipeline for my Node.js project on GitHub Actions.
Recommend a good Italian restaurant near downtown.
